    B

    Board - Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
    Class generating and holding the playing board.
    Board(int, int) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Board
    Constructor that generates a random board of tiles with walls with given size.
    boardHeight() - Method in record class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.GameSettings
    Returns the value of the boardHeight record component.
    boardWidth() - Method in record class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.GameSettings
    Returns the value of the boardWidth record component.

    C

    canMove(Hero, Direction) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Logic
    True iff hero can move in given direction based on logic.
    createScene() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view.EndScreen
    This creates the scene of ending screen
    createScene() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view.GameScreen
    The main thing that makes the game playable.
    createScene(Consumer) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view.SetupScreen
    This makes the setup screen.
    cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze - package cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze
    Package with the whole game.
    cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model - package cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
    This package holds the logic of the game.
    cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view - package cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view
    This package takes care of the UI.

    D

    Direction - Enum Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
    Enum class with directions.
    disable() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.TimeReset
    Set time resetter not active (it has been used).
    disableReset(TimeReset) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Logic
    After the resetter has been used, it should be disabled.
    DOWN - Enum constant in enum class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Direction
    Direction down

    E

    EndScreen - Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view
    Graphics of the screen that shows at the end of the game.
    EndScreen(GameEndReason) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view.EndScreen
    Constructor based on the reason the game ended
    equals(Object) - Method in record class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.GameSettings
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    Exit - Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
    A logical class holding coordinates of an exit.
    Exit(int, int) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Exit
    Constructor of the class.

    G

    gameEndedCheck() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Logic
    True iff the game has ended (all missions are complete or the time is out).
    GameEndListener - Interface in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view
    Interface, so that the classes of different game stages can "communicate"
    GameEndReason - Enum Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
    Enum of reasons to end the game.
    GameScreen - Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view
    The UI of the main game.
    GameScreen(Logic, GameEndListener) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view.GameScreen
    Constructor using logic and endListener.
    GameSettings - Record Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
    The settings a player can choose at the initial screen.
    GameSettings(List, int, int, double) - Constructor for record class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.GameSettings
    Creates an instance of a GameSettings record class.
    getBoard() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Logic
    Get the board.
    getExits() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Logic
    get list of all exits.
    getHeroes() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Logic
    Get list of all heroes.
    getKey(Direction) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Hero
    Get the code of keypress that moves a hero.
    getTimeReset() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Logic
    Get the time resetter object some hero is standing on.
    getTimeResets() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Logic
    get list of all time resets
    getX() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Exit
    Get x-coordinate (horizontal) of exit.
    getX() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Hero
    Get the x-coordinate (horizontal) of a hero
    getX() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.TimeReset
    Get the x-coordinate (horizontal).
    getY() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Exit
    Get y-coordinate (vertical) of exit.
    getY() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Hero
    Get the y-coordinate (vertical) of a hero
    getY() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.TimeReset
    Get the y-coordinate (vertical)

    H

    hashCode() - Method in record class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.GameSettings
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    height() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Board
    Returns the height of the playing board.
    Hero - Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
    Class that represents logic of a hero (one play piece).
    Hero(int, int) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Hero
    A simple constructor used mainly for debugging.
    Hero(int, int, KeyCode, KeyCode, KeyCode, KeyCode) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Hero
    Constructor of a hero.
    heroes() - Method in record class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.GameSettings
    Returns the value of the heroes record component.

    I

    initialTime() - Method in record class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.GameSettings
    Returns the value of the initialTime record component.
    isActive() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.TimeReset
    Return true iff time resetter is active (it has not been used).
    isOccupied() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Tile
    Return true iff there is a hero on this tile.
    isWall(Direction) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Tile
    Return true iff there is a wall in Diretion d.

    L

    LEFT - Enum constant in enum class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Direction
    Direction left
    Logic - Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
    Class that takes all the logic of the game into one place.

    Constructor from heroes and board size.
    Logic(List) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Logic
    Constructor based on heroes.

    M

    Magic maze project - Section in Overview
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.Main
    Launches the game.
    Main - Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze
     
    Main() - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.Main
     
    move(Direction) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Hero
    Move the hero, if it can be moved.
    move(Hero, Direction) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Logic
    If the hero can be moved in a given direction, move it.

    O

    onGameEnd(GameEndReason) - Method in interface cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view.GameEndListener
    What to do when game ends based on the reason

    R

    removeReset(TimeReset) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Logic
    remove time reset from logic
    reset() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view.Timer
    Reset the timer, so it starts from totalTime again.
    RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Direction
    Direction right

    S

    setKey(Direction, KeyCode) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Hero
    Set the code of keypress that moves a hero.
    setOccupied(boolean) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Tile
    Set the tile occupied or not (there is a hero standing).
    SetupScreen - Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view
    Initial screen, where controls can be chosen.
    SetupScreen() - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view.SetupScreen
    The initial screen with default values.
    setX(int) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Hero
    Set the x-coordinate
    setY(int) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Hero
    Set the y-coordinate
    start() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view.Timer
    Start the timer.
    start(Stage) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.Main
    Start the setup stage (SetupScreen).
    SUCCESS - Enum constant in enum class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.GameEndReason
    The game ended because of a win.

    T

    Tile - Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
    Class of logic representing a single tile on the board.
    Tile(int, int) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Tile
    A simple constructor mainly for debugging.
    Tile(int, int, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Tile
    Constructor of tile on board.
    tileAt(int, int) - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Board
    Returns a Tile from given coordinates on playing board.
    TIMEOUT - Enum constant in enum class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.GameEndReason
    The game ended, because the players ran out of time.
    Timer - Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view
    Class to control the timer in the game.
    Timer(double, Label, Runnable) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view.Timer
    Constructs the class.
    TimeReset - Class in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
    Class holding a time-resetter
    TimeReset(int, int) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.TimeReset
    Constructor.
    timeResetsCheck() - Method in class cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model.Logic
    True iff there is a hero standing on an active time resetter.

    Returns a string representation of this record class.
